description_long: This house features a modern, boxy design with clean lines and a predominantly white brick exterior. Large rectangular windows are distributed across both stories, allowing ample natural light into the interior spaces. The structure includes multiple levels, with a flat roof and several recessed or open rooftop areas, one of which appears to be a small terrace or garden. The main entryway is located on the lower level, marked by a simple door and flanked by tall windows. Interior furnishings such as bookshelves and tables are visible through the windows, suggesting a residential function. The overall aesthetic is minimalist, with an emphasis on geometric forms and functional space.
description: A modern, two-story white brick house with large windows, flat roofs, and minimalist geometric design. Features include a rooftop terrace, visible interior furnishings, and a simple main entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door, large windows, and a glimpse of the interior living space and bookshelves.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the upper-level terrace area and the layered, boxy structure of the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying more windows, a secondary entrance, and the overall asymmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the rooftop terrace and additional windows, emphasizing the house's multi-level design.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple flush door with no porch or overhang, flanked by tall windows
